ddls:
CREATE TABLE "json_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JSON file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the JSON file */,
  "file_size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the JSON file in bytes */,
  "number_of_objects" INTEGER /* Number of objects in the JSON file */,
  "file_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the JSON file (simple, medium, complex) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the JSON file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the JSON file (e.g., JSON, JSONL) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum or hash of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_location" TEXT /* Location where the file is stored (e.g., S3 bucket, local path) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parsing_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parsing task */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JSON file being processed */,
  "initialization_time_ns" INTEGER /* Time taken to initialize the parsing task in nanoseconds */,
  "building_input_options_time_ns" INTEGER /* Time taken to build input options for the parsing task in nanoseconds */,
  "parsing_time_gpu_ns" INTEGER /* Time taken to parse JSON with libcudf in nanoseconds */,
  "total_time_gpu_ns" INTEGER /* Total time measured by the GPU in nanoseconds */,
  "total_time_cpu_ns" INTEGER /* Total time measured by the CPU in nanoseconds */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the parsing task (pending, in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "task_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the parsing task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the parsing task */,
  "task_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the parsing task */,
  "task_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the parsing task */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the task in seconds */,
  "task_error_message" TEXT /* Error message or exceptions that occur during the parsing task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parsing_tasks_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES json_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Development, Production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., cloud, on-premises) */,
  "environment_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the environment */,
  "environment_location" TEXT /* Physical or cloud location of the environment */,
  "environment_status" TEXT /* Status of the environment (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_environments" (
  "task_environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task-environment association */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parsing task */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  "environment_status" TEXT /* Status of the environment during the task execution */,
  "environment_specifications" TEXT /* Specifications of the environment during the task execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_environments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES parsing_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_environments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data engineer, system administrator, performance analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parsing task being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the task */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made (e.g., office, home) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES parsing_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parsing task */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., nanoseconds, bytes) */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric (e.g., initialization, parsing) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES parsing_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JSON file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES json_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task version */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parsing task */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the task */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_versions_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES parsing_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task version */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., nanoseconds, bytes) */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric (e.g., initialization, parsing) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES task_versions ("version_id")
)
